title: The Sound Behind the Wall
content: For several evenings, strange scratching sounds came from behind the living room wall. The family imagined many possible explanations, but no one knew the truth. They called a local repair worker, who carefully opened a small section of the wall. Inside, he found a family of tiny mice building a nest. The animals were safely moved outside, and the wall was repaired. After that, the mysterious sounds disappeared, leaving only a funny family story.
